name: Combat Drone Mark I
description: Orbits the enemy ship and repeatedly fires a small laser.

name: Combat Drone Mark II
description: Orbits the enemy ship and rapidly fires blasts of lasers.

name: Defense Drone Mark I
description: Orbits your ship and shoots down incoming missiles and asteroids.

name: Defense Drone Mark II
description: Orbits your ship and shoots down incoming missiles, lasers, and asteroids.

name: System Repair Drone
description: Moves around your ship automatically repairing damaged systems.

name: Anti-Personnel Drone
description: Slowly moves around your ship engaging enemy boarders. Has high health.

name: Boarding Drone
description: Launches across to the enemy ship, breaching the hull and attacking crew.
